calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-017 sleep-phase readiness probe -- Phase 2 retest (5-flag template successor to V3-EXQ-500)
items.note: Sleep substrate plan GAP-2 Phase 2 successor cohort (1 of 4 remaining Tier-1 EXQs after V3-EXQ-265a PASS 2026-05-09T20:12Z). Applies the validated 5-flag substrate template (sd016_writepath_mode='off', sd016_diversification_weight=0.5, use_per_stream_vs=True, use_anchor_sets=True, use_sd039_anchor_payload=True) to the EXQ-500 SD-017 readiness probe. Single-arm probe; no C4 |diff| acceptance (vs 265a/503a). C1/C2/C3 acceptance preserved from EXQ-500. Mac smoke PASS 2026-05-09T20:40Z.
